description: Smoke prompts for the universal artifact renderer library. Most production usage happens indirectly via consumer-skill script_paths; these evals exercise direct activation paths.

evals.prompt: I have a Markdown file at artifacts/draft.md. Render it to a Word document at artifacts/draft.docx with the title 'Volume I — Technical Approach' and a table of contents.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill calls run_script on scripts/render_docx.py with --input, --output, --metadata title=..., --toc flags. Reports the output path back to the user. Exit code 0.
success_criteria: Uses run_script tool, not write_file or shell
Confirms exit_code == 0 and reports artifact path

evals.prompt: Render artifacts/note.md as a DOCX. (Run on a system without Pandoc installed.)
evals.expected_behavior: Renderer script exits 127 with install hint on stderr. Skill surfaces the install instructions verbatim to the user instead of pretending success.
success_criteria: Recognizes exit_code 127 as missing-toolchain, not a script bug
Quotes the multi-platform install hint from stderr
Does NOT retry or attempt a fallback renderer

evals.prompt: Write me a Volume I technical approach for an Air Force RFP and produce it as a DOCX.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill declines the authoring portion (scope is rendering, not drafting) and recommends invoking proposal-generator first to produce the Markdown, then handing the result here for DOCX rendering.
success_criteria: Does NOT attempt to draft proposal content
Names proposal-generator as the correct authoring skill
Offers to render the resulting Markdown once proposal-generator produces it

evals.prompt: I have a proposal_draft.json envelope at artifacts/proposal_draft.json with compliance_matrix, themes, and fab_chains arrays. Render it to artifacts/compliance_matrix.xlsx with workbook title 'Compliance Matrix — Program X'.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill calls run_script on scripts/render_xlsx.py with --input, --output, --title flags. Reports the output path. Each top-level array in the envelope becomes a separate sheet; non-array fields (executive_summary_md, warnings) are correctly ignored.
success_criteria: Confirms exit_code == 0 and reports artifact path
Mentions that compliance_matrix / themes / fab_chains became separate sheets
